form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months 4th of 7 at this track on March 30 over 1200m, 16 len behind Ramo De Ouro with 52kg at $3.60. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at Cidade Jardim on February 1 2025 over 1200m, on a wet track; 12 len behind Calypso Dance with 58kg at $6.40. One of the top chances.

form.formComment: Comes off a 43 day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at this track on March 2 over 1300m, on rain affected going; 0.3 len behind Sadiq carrying 55kg at $2.60. The run before that favourite; scored a big 6 len win at this track February 3 over 1100m in heavy going defeating Noz Peca carrying 57kg at $2.70. Nicely placed to score.

form.formComment: Returns from a 50-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 11 at this track on February 23 over 1200m, 7 len behind Go Runner Go with 58kg at $3.80. The start before that 3rd of 9 at Cristal on January 15 over 1200m, 5 len behind Quarter Pound carrying 58kg at $14.80. Can do much better.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 7 at this track on March 30 over 1200m, 12 len behind Ramo De Ouro carrying 58kg at $6.60. Before that 9th of 11 at this track on March 23 over 1300m, 10 len behind Knock Down with 58kg at $22.20. Going well. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation when last of 7 at this track January 13 over 1400m, 8 len behind Jacta D'anafer with 58kg at $12.10. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at this track October 20 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 3 len behind Sultao Da Lagoa carrying 56kg at $4.90. Likely to be up for this.
